request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how over-reliance on foreign tech puts our national security at risk. Remember when the Chinese hacked our defense systems in 2024? That's why we need to support domestic tech development, even if it means temporary costs. Our allies are stepping up - why can't we? #StrongerTogether #SecureOurFuture
